feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we copy unreleased CDS view code and use it for developing custom CDS views?
entry.content:
In the Fiori View Browser app, I can see a lot of CDS views are marked as Not released for development. I was wondering if we can use eclipse to directly copy the CDS view code and create a custom one. Reason being we need to enhance a CDS view but are not able to using standard apps due to the CDS view marked as not released for development. 

 

What would be implications or drawbacks of this approach?

entry.title: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis (MDA) App Fiori App Title?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone!

I have created an MDA App in S/4HANA Public Cloud, Is there any way I can translate my Launchpad App Descriptor Item? The Maintain Translations app doesn't pick it up.

 

Thank you in advances!

entry.title: ABAP CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need help to analyze the standard CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001

When I open proivew in Eclipse I can see set of parameter define in this view.

But same CDS when I open in AFO or RSRT, I can see additional parameter (Like Ledger Fiscal year) which is mandatory and restrciting the output for the selection. PFA.

Please help me to identify where this additional parameter is maintained.

Thank You

Vinod

SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Data and Analytics SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Analytical Query: Annotations for Filter by Measure
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I have built a Analytical Query using CDS. I have a requirement to automatically filter out data, which doesn't match specific conditions in few of the Columns(measures).

For eg. assume the condition is to exclude rows wherever Delta is 0

Col1Col2Col3Val1Val2Delta
ABE12-1
ABD220
ACD211
GCE422
GCF330

Depending which Characteristic columns user chooses columns to display, Delta column may result in various values.

Col1Val1Val2Delta
A550
G752
Col3Val1Val2Delta
D431
E541
F330
Col2Col3Val1Val2Delta
BD220
BE12-1
CD211
CE422
CF330

I can achieve this requirement by using "Filter by Measures" at runtime. Is there a way to achieve this via ABAP CDS annotations?

Thank You

Cc: copying some blog authors here for their advice @AndreaUS @joerg_franke @MarkGreen

entry.title: CDS Views for SAC models
entry.content:
Hi,

How to find alternative standard CDS views for the SAC RAPID model (business content).

entry.title: Best practices for embedding analytics and reporting
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Could you please suggest best practices for embedded analytics and reporting where I have to create custom CDS, custom analytical queries and multi-dimensional reports along with KPI creations.

Best Regards,
Malika Bathla.

entry.title: Drilldown and Navigate to in multi dimensional report of custom analytical queries
entry.content:
Hello Team,

On S/4 Hana private cloud, I have a requirement to create custom analytical queries as end user and be able to add new navigations on my queries and remove few standard navigations coming via standard semantics of added fields.

Is it possible to do so? Can we change the order of navigations shown in custom analytical queries - standard navigations displayed?
Can we remove the one not needed and can we add new for new custom field (if added)?

Also, is it possible to get link on line item shown in the table view of multi dimesional report?

Best Regards,
Malika Bathla.

entry.title: SAP RAP & Analytical List Page - How to group and sort by grouped summed values?
entry.content:
Hey developers!

 

I've just managed to develop my first Analytical List Page which consumes data from a RAP service. 

 

I'm curious how to group the values of the lineitems and sort them by the summarized value. The default sorting does not have any effect when the entries are grouped.

 

In below view, I've grouped my data based on the "rolename". Each rolename has multiple entries which all contain an integer value. 

The grouping already shows the summed values.

Although sorting descending is configured, the summed values per group are not sorted.

Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Greetings!

entry.title: Error in activating custom Model in custom ISLM scenario
entry.content:
Hi All

I am trying to create a embedded ISLM Scenario in S4 2023 system. I am following the blog.

However I am unable to activate the model. I have close to 17000 records in the training view. But still I am not able to train the model. An help is appreciated.

@Masaaki Can you help ? 

 

Model : Z12343
MV: ZPQWLLAXFP0IWNSY3VRZH1KMVF
Status: training
Creating intelligent model
Error occurred during Specified Model training
Exception occurred in CL_ISLM2_ENGINE->TRAIN_SPECIFIED_MODEL at line 201
A database error occured. The error message in the database was: "transaction rolled back by an inte
rnal error: "SAP_HANA_UMML_ENGINE_STATIC"."sap.hana.pai.Engine::TrainModel": line 127 col 3 (at pos
5378): "SAP_HANA_UMML_ENGINE_DYNAMIC"."sap.hana.pai.Engine.internal::TrainModelHelper": line 44 col
5 (at pos 1923): "SAP_HANA_UMML_ENGINE_STATIC"."sap.hana.pai.Engine.APL::TrainModel": line 143 col 5
(at pos 6790): "SAP_PA_APL"."sap.pa.apl.base::TRAIN_MODEL": line 45 col 4 (at pos 2381): AFL error:
search table error: _SYS_AFL.APL_AREA:TRAIN_MODEL: [423] (range 3) AFL error exception: [APL error]
Automated Analytics error (-2147024809): phase 'KxCPPInterf::IKxenModel::sendMode()' [The data sou
rce doesn't have enough rows to produce a reliable predictive model. Use a dataset with more rows.]"
.
Exception occurred in CL_SQL_STATEMENT->PREPARED_UPDATE at line 3
Model Training was unsuccessful
Exception occurred in CL_ISLM2_MODELVERSION->EXECUTE_TRAIN_FROM_SPEC at line 141
Model Training was unsuccessful
Status: error

Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management for SAP S/4HANA 

Thanks in advance,

Vijay V

entry.title: Manage KPIs and Report issue with Allow CDS Views Annotations ON/OFF
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I am having an issue about the APP Manage KPIs and Reports:

In the creation of a KPI, in the section 'Data Source Details' there is a check called 'Allow CDS Views Annotations', I set it OFF, but when I run it, in the Adapt Filters option the fields are not correct, there are appearing multiple times, here is my custom CDS, then some screenshots

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVIEWNOTASSG'
@analytics.query: true
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #ANALYTICAL_QUERY ]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Products not assigned'
@analytics.settings.runtimeExtensibility.allowed: true
@vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@odata.publish: true

define view ZC_ProdNotAssignAB_Query
with parameters
@EndUserText.label: 'Number of Days Back'
@Consumption.hidden :false
P_NumOfDays : int4
as select from ZI_ProdNotAssignABCube(P_NumOfDays:$parameters.P_NumOfDays)
{
AllocatingEntity,
Plant,
product,

$parameters.P_NumOfDays as NumberOfDaysBack,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis:#ROWS
@Consumption.filter :{ selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false }

NumberAssignmentMissing

}

As you can see, when I select one Entity at the bottom does not appear the correct value.

But if I delete those annotations from my view, everything works fine:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVIEWNOTASSG'
@analytics.query: true
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #ANALYTICAL_QUERY ]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Products not assigned'
@analytics.settings.runtimeExtensibility.allowed: true
@vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@odata.publish: true

define view ZC_ProdNotAssignAB_Query
with parameters
@EndUserText.label: 'Number of Days Back'
@Consumption.hidden :false
P_NumOfDays : int4
as select from ZI_ProdNotAssignABCube(P_NumOfDays:$parameters.P_NumOfDays)
{
AllocatingEntity,
Plant,
product,

$parameters.P_NumOfDays as NumberOfDaysBack,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis:#ROWS
@Consumption.filter :{ selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false }

NumberAssignmentMissing

}

As you can see in the above images, without the annotations the filters are working correct, not duplicating the values (first image) and then in the bottom of the second image is appearing the description and value

Does anyone have an idea what is happening? Maybe I am not using correctly that check 'Allow CDS Views Annotations'. Or any hint that you can share?

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Automatic population of Sales Order ID in Embedded Content field on the Sales Order Item Object Page
entry.content:
Hello @everyone ,

I have embedded a custom business object data creation screen into the Sales Order Item Object Page in S/4HANA Cloud 2508. I am struggling to get the Sales Order ID to auto-fill into the CBO field via parameter mapping in URL. Users currently have to enter the ID manually, which we want to avoid. Could someone provide the correct mapping steps for this specific release?

Best Regards,
Myat

entry.title: SAP Analytical Reports G\L Accounts Goods Receipt/Manufacturing Order Seperate Rows
entry.content:
Hi Good Day SAP Community I have a Problem

I am building an Analytical Report in S/4HANA based on a CDS data source.

My report shows costs by G/L / cost structure, which is working correctly.
However, I also need to display Production in Kilos and Total Quantity as separate rows,

Important:

These production quantities are not related to G/L Accounts and should not be aligned or broken down by them. They should appear as standalone totals (e.g. at the bottom of the report), as shown in the attached image.

 

 



This describes the exact problem I am trying to solve. Please see the attached image for reference.

This is the data from the extracted report.

entry.title: How to configure OKTA as Identity Authentication for Embedded Analytics( SAP Incentive Compensation)
entry.content:
Need some insight on how to configure OKTA as Identity Authentication for Embedded Analytics, using the following blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/connect-okta-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/13468665, ), when tried to use OKTA identity provider as conditional authentication it says user not present contact administrator.

SAP Incentive Management SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics

entry.title: Embedded Analytics - SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I am trying to create a custom Story dashboard in Manage KPIs and Reports Fiori application using Embedded Analytics cloud features in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition.

However, I am facing an issue during the configuration. While embedding the SAC story, I encounter an error please refer to the attached screenshot for details. 

I would appreciate it if you could guide me on how to resolve the above error and design dashboard.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Function Union ALL for CDS VIEW in SAP S4HANA Public CLoud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Am working on CDS view in S4HANA Public cloud, and am wondering how to do 'UNION ALL' Function, since the system with CDS view it only allows to choose key fields for associations and cardinality , 

NB : I dont have access to ABAP environement .

Thank you .

entry.title: in S4HCloud - Query Browser app missing
entry.content:
in S4HCloud 2508 I don't find the Query Browser (not in any space, not in the app finder).

I included many roles already, as shown below, but still I don't have the App "Query Browser" in our development tenant. (Though I see the app now in the customizing tenant, where also the roles are assigned. All other roles are automatically valid for both tenants/clients - but not in the case of "QueryBrowser")

I added already many roles as described in a former post from 2018/2024, but it does not change anything.

*BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST 
*BR_EMPLOYEE 
*BR_ADMINISTRATOR 
*BR_DEVELOPER 

Meanwhile I  added the by @dawid90  mentioned roles resp. the catalogs from the blog he mentioned, but it only helped to have the app in the customizing tenant, not in the development tenant.
I don't know if this split is unusual, I guess not.

Other colleagues with only role *BR_DEVELOPER  do have access/find it.

Any ideas? Thanks!

entry.title: Combined Chart Column & Line with different dimentions on s4 hana analytical report
entry.content:
Hi all, Im a developer, not a bi/bw expert

i've created a Cube and a Query on S4hana, after that i've created an analytical report with some graphics and it is working well. ( Using app manage KPI and Reports )

My requirement is to have a combined chart, Collum and Line, but the line is just to have the total, so different dimentions :

So Columns are PLANT/DATE. Line shoud be only DATE ( to display the total )

Currently when im creating the combined it displays Column and Line, but with same values

 

What i need is only 1 line with total. Is it possible to create such graphic on Analytical list page?

current graphic configuration

S4 Hana 2025 ( we dont have SAC )

entry.title: Embedded Analytics - Custom Cube for Margin Analysis - Calculated Key Figure shows no data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

let me give you some additional information before explaining the issue.

Back in R/3 we used KE35 (Form) and KER1 (Key Figure Scheme) to prepare for KE30 (Profitability Report) in SAP CO-PA modul.

So far i have done significant tests only with transient view entity … analytical query and was able to replace our custom reports from R/3 costing based COPA to S/4 Margin Analysis queries and the results are very good.

However, i noticed that using a custom consumption view offers very little reuseability. A new requirement triggers a new consumption view and copy/paste of the CDS view. So i want to achieve REUSEABILITY for restricted measures and calculated measures. Looking at the SAP VDM i think it is time to build custom cubes, which i successfully circumvented so far.

So how can i replace R/3 „Forms“, „Key Figures Schemes“ and „Reports“ with Embedded Analytics? I am trying to do a crossover to the VDM which uses cubes, querys, restricted measures, and calculated measures. (Screenshot shows R/3 setup of CO-PA reporting)

 

 

I am not trying to replicate the old world 1 by 1, but take over what is still useful e.g. „Prepare a Form“ and „Prepare Key Figures“ and reuse this in multiple querys.

I created the above „custom VDM“ and while the values of the restricted measures are shown correct (see below, RSRT) in the consumption view, the calcuated measures are always inital. What am i doing wrong?

Formulas are very simple:

Revenue - COGS = ContributionMargin1 and FIDirect - OverhAlloc = FIMinusOverhead

My guess is that the calculated measures may have lost their dimensions? Could that be the reason?

Or do i not understand how aggregation works?

Greatful for any tipps. I can share the CDS Views if needed.

Thank you

Regards

David

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Custom Analytical Queries And Services; export no longer possible?
entry.content:
In the lastest Public Cloud update (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2602) the new "Custom Analytical Queries And Services" app was introduced for the creation of analytical queries and services. The former "Custom Analytical Queries" app is still available, but one is no longer able to create new queries. 

The problem with new app I am currently facing is that there seems to be no export functionality anymore. Previously it was fairly easy to export the resultset of my query to Excel oder CSV but this functionality is no longer available.

Do you know any workarounds how I get my query exported?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: How to pass longtext via extraction enable CDS to Datasphere
entry.content:
I need to pass longtext in datasphere using extraction enabled CDS. However, neither longtext nor table functions can be used for it.
Could you please to identify the best way to do it.

Regards,
Malika Bathla.

SAP Datasphere SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP S/4HANA
